instruction: The hackathon email thread in the inbox needs attention today. Then check the Paris board and calendar; right now the next step is already on the board, and if it only needs async follow-up, leave the calendar alone, so fill only what is missing, note it in a handoff file, and send support@example.com a quick update.

hidden_constraints.value: Tracking the next step for Paris.

solution_commands: file create --path '/handoff/paris-hackathon-followup.txt' --content 'Paris hackathon follow-up handoff note.'
email send --to support@example.com --subject 'Hackathon follow-up for Paris' --body 'Tracking the next step for Paris.'
